name: Premier Investments Limited
analysis: PMV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$14.3000, stop A$12.3750, target A$20.0750 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
